video_info.title: UEFA International Friendlies
video_info.shortDescription: England and Japan meet in an international friendly that brings together two sides known for discipline, tempo, and technical precision. video_info.title: European Qualifiers For 2026 FIFA World Cup
video_info.shortDescription: Sweden face Poland in a compelling Play‑Off final that pits organization and physical strength against technical execution and counter‑attacking threat. Sweden will seek to control territory and tempo, while Poland aim to stay compact and strike decisively when opportunities arise. Find out who comes on top as we bring you all the action from the European Qualifiers for 2026 FIFA World Cup, LIVE on Sony LIV.

video_info.title: European Qualifiers For 2026 FIFA World Cup
video_info.shortDescription: Bosnia‑Herzegovina and Italy collide in a high‑stakes Play‑Off final that brings together belief, resilience, and elite knockout pedigree. Bosnia‑Herzegovina arrive aiming to disrupt the rhythm and feed off moments of pressure, while Italy will look to impose control through structure, discipline, and game management. With a World Cup berth on the line, this final promises intensity, precision, and a razor‑thin margin between success and heartbreak. Find out who comes on top as we bring you all the action from the European Qualifiers for 2026 FIFA World Cup, LIVE on Sony LIV.
